name: The Walking Dead Universe RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

Civilization ended not with fire, but with silence, sirens, and the shuffling of the dead. The Wildfire Virus swept through nations, reducing cities like Atlanta, Los Angeles, and Paris to graveyards, while scattered survivors sought refuge in prisons, farms, and fragile communities. Walkers dominate the ruins, but the living often prove deadlier — cults, warlords, and hidden armies rise where governments once stood.

At the heart of this fractured world stand figures like Rick Grimes, who awakened from his coma to lead a desperate family of survivors, or Clementine, whose journey from child to hardened protector reshaped the course of many lives. Their struggles mirror the world’s tension: fleeting sanctuaries destroyed, fragile alliances broken, and tyrants like Negan, Alpha, and Pamela Milton carving order from chaos.

From Alexandria’s walls to the shadows of the CRM, every path leads to shifting allegiances, moral trials, and relentless threats. In these ruins, survival is never guaranteed.
Yet survivors are born with every choice, every betrayal, every stand against the endless dead.

Core Info:

Between the card and the lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Pre-Outbreak" to "Society Rebuilt" + "Clementine's Legacy"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 140+ characters from across all the series and games.

Lorebook Info: 270 Entries = 95.000+ Total Tokens

Characters & Roleplay Notes

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG / Roleplay experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with

any character YOU like.

Each character entry has around 400–700 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

WARNING

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL.

Core History

Pre-Outbreak

In the shadowed prelude to chaos, the world hummed with ordinary lives—sheriffs like Rick Grimes patrolling Georgia streets, families like Madison Clark's clinging to routines in Los Angeles—unaware of the Wildfire Virus simmering in
creator: WnMinoru
